**Scanner model:** [e.g., ZKTeco K40]

**Firmware version:** [e.g., ZLM60]

**Connection method:**
- [ ] ADMS push
- [ ] SDK pull (TCP)
- [ ] Both

**What works:**
- [ ] Device discovery
- [ ] User list sync
- [ ] Attendance log pull
- [ ] Real-time events

**What doesn't work:**

**Logs:**
```
Set RUST_LOG=timekeep=debug and paste relevant output
```
